news.t: Asian stocks bleed after Trump's tariffs: Nikkei down 2%, Kospi crashes 3%

holdings.infoBox: HFXI is an equity ETF with a total of 804 individual holdings. The top holdings are Samsung Electronics stock at 3.18%, ASML Holding at 2.21%, SK hynix at 1.91%, HSBC Holdings at 1.24%, and Roche Holding AG at 1.18%.

overview.description: The NYLI FTSE International Equity Currency Neutral ETF (HFXI) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in total market equity. The fund tracks a market cap-weighted index of large- and mid-cap companies located in developed nations outside of North America, with roughly half of its foreign currency exposure hedged to the USD. HFXI was launched on Jul 22, 2015 and is issued by New York Life Investments.
infoTable: FTSE Developed ex North America 50% Hedged to USD Index
